hooks.name: code-formatter
hooks.description: Format Python code with Black on write/edit operations

hooks.name: protect-crucial-files
hooks.description: Prevent deletion of critical files like .env, database files, etc.
hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$1" =~ \.(env|db|sqlite|sqlite3)$ ]] || [[ "$1" == ".git"* ]] || [[ "$1" == "requirements.txt" ]] || [[ "$1" == "app.py" ]]; then echo "Error: Cannot delete protected file: $1"; exit 1; fi'
hooks.error_message: This is a protected file and cannot be deleted. Contact admin if needed.
